title: CBN Reaffirms Commitment to Financial System Stability, Safety of Depositors’ Funds - FinancialEDGE
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has reassure the general public of its unwavering commitment to ensuring the stability and reliability of the Nigerian financial system. The apex bank disclosed this on tuesday in a statement made available to Financial Edge and signed by Mrs Hakama Sidi Ali, Ag. Director, Corporate Communications. According to her
html: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has  reassure the general public of its unwavering commitment to ensuring the stability and reliability of the Nigerian financial system.
